subject: docs(patterns): extract Z_INDEX_SCALE as standalone implementation pattern
body:
The z-index scale was duplicated across BURGER_MENU.md, THEME_DARK_MODE.md,
and referenced inline in DEBUG_SYSTEM.md and PWA_SYSTEM.md. Extracting it
as the 9th pattern doc eliminates duplication and gives it a single source
of truth that all repos can reference.

Pattern covers: 8-layer scale, rules, audit commands, stacking context
gotchas, per-framework notes. All existing patterns updated to reference
it. TODO.md gap matrix expanded with Z_INDEX_SCALE column and per-repo
implementation items added for all 10 downstream repos.

Tags: documentation, patterns, z-index, architecture
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-compliance
Semver: minor
